## Section Affected
Which page or section of the documentation needs improvement?

## Current Issue
What is unclear, missing, or incorrect?

## Suggested Improvement
How would you suggest we fix this? (e.g., add a screenshot, clarify a step, add an example)

## Additional Context
Any other thoughts or references?
